## Description

Brief summary of your changes. What problem does this solve? What feature does it add?

**Related Issue:** Closes #(issue number)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation update
- [ ] chore: Maintenance / dependencies
- [ ] perf: Performance improvement
- [ ] refactor: Code refactoring
- [ ] test: Test updates

---

## Changes Made

- Describe what changed
- Use bullet points for clarity
- Be specific about modified files/functions

---

## Checklist

Before submitting, please verify:

- [ ] **Conventional commit** — My commit message(s) follow the format: `type(scope): subject`
- [ ] **No generated file edits** — I have not edited generated files (except in `examples/*-generated/`)
- [ ] **Tests pass** — All tests pass locally: `pnpm test`
- [ ] **Code quality** — Linting passes: `pnpm lint`
- [ ] **Builds successfully** — Build succeeds: `pnpm build`
- [ ] **Follows scope** — This PR contains one logical feature/fix (no mixed concerns)
- [ ] **Targets `develop`** — This PR targets the `develop` branch, not `master`

---

## Testing

How was this tested? Include:

- Unit tests added/updated
- Manual testing steps
- Affected packages tested

---

## Screenshots / Live Demo

If applicable, include screenshots or links to demo the change.
